description: EtherFi is a liquid staking protocol that issues eETH (and its wrapped variant weETH) against ETH deposits. Staked ETH is restaked into EigenLayer strategies and Lido stETH positions, earning both consensus-layer and restaking rewards. The protocol is fully upgradeable: most core contracts sit behind EIP-1967 proxies controlled by a 3-day timelock, with a secondary 8-hour timelock governing operational parameters. A 3/5 multisig and a 4/7 multisig share proposer/executor roles on these timelocks, and several EOAs hold pauser or node-operator privileges. External dependencies include EigenLayer (delegation, pod management, strategy deposits), Lido (stETH minting and withdrawals), Curve (liquidity pools), Coinbase cbETH, and LayerZero (cross-chain messaging). Total capital at risk across admins is {{totalCapitalAtRisk}}.

eth:0x9f26d4C958fD811A1F59B01B86Be7dFFc9.name: EtherFi Main Timelock (3d)
eth:0x9f26d4C958fD811A1F59B01B86Be7dFFc9.description: Primary governance timelock with a 3-day delay. Controls upgrades to the majority of protocol contracts (LiquidityPool, EtherFiNodesManager, StakingManager, TNFT, WithdrawRequestNFT, Liquifier, MembershipManager, and others), manages EtherFiRestaker EigenLayer operations (delegation, strategy deposits, withdrawals), and governs protocol parameters across AuctionManager, EtherFiOracle, ProtocolRevenueManager, and MembershipNFT. Holds proposer/executor roles shared with the 4/7 multisig. Controls {{mainTimelockCapital}} in direct capital exposure across 155 permissioned functions.

eth:0xcD425f44758a08BaAB3C4908f3e3dE5776.name: EtherFi Operational Timelock (8h)
eth:0xcD425f44758a08BaAB3C4908f3e3dE5776.description: Secondary timelock with an 8-hour delay, governing operational parameters. Controls EtherFiAdmin settings (validator task batch size, rebase APR bounds), EtherFiNodesManager node operations (sweepFunds, EigenPod management, forwarded calls), EtherFiRedemptionManager parameters (capacity, refill rate, exit fees), and LiquidityPool validator configuration (validator size, spawner registration, fee recipient). Controls {{operationalTimelockCapital}} in direct capital.

eth:0xcdd57D11476c22d265722F68390b036f3D.name: EtherFi Governance 4/7 Multisig
eth:0xcdd57D11476c22d265722F68390b036f3D.description: A 4-of-7 multisig that holds proposer and executor roles on the main 3-day EtherFiTimelock. Can schedule, execute, and cancel timelock transactions. Does not control any contracts directly — all actions are gated by the timelock delay.

eth:0x2aCA71020De61bb532008049e1Bd41E451.name: EtherFi Operations 3/5 Multisig
eth:0x2aCA71020De61bb532008049e1Bd41E451.description: A 3-of-5 multisig with direct control over operational functions: pausing/unpausing LiquidityPool, EtherFiAdmin, EtherFiRateLimiter, and EtherFiRedemptionManager; managing DummyTokenUpgradeable roles; triggering batch validator creation; and configuring rate limiter consumers. Can also recover stuck ETH/ERC20/ERC721 from eETH and weETH token contracts. Controls {{operationsMultisigCapital}} in direct capital across 35 functions.

eth:0x0EF8fa4760Db8f5Cd4d993f3e3416f30f9.name: EtherFiAdmin Contract
eth:0x0EF8fa4760Db8f5Cd4d993f3e3416f30f9.description: An upgradeable admin contract that aggregates multiple protocol operations behind a single caller. Manages validator lifecycle (approval, confirmation, funding), LiquidityPool parameters (validator size, fee recipient, restaking config), pause/unpause, and protocol fee payments. Owned by the main 3-day timelock. Controls {{etherFiAdminCapital}} in direct capital.

eth:0x62247D29B4B9BECf4BB73E0c722cf6445c.name: RoleRegistry Contract
eth:0x62247D29B4B9BECf4BB73E0c722cf6445c.description: An upgradeable role-based access control contract that gates operations on WithdrawRequestNFT (finalize/invalidate/validate requests, pause, handle remainders) and Wrapped eETH Token (recover assets, upgrade proxy). The RoleRegistry itself is owned by the main 3-day timelock. Controls {{roleRegistryCapital}} in reachable capital through withdrawal and weETH management.

eth:0x9AF1298993DC1f397973C62A5D47a284CF.name: Pauser EOA (0x9AF1...844D)
eth:0x9AF1298993DC1f397973C62A5D47a284CF.description: An EOA with pause-only privileges. Can pause EtherFiAdmin, LiquidityPool, EtherFiRateLimiter, EtherFiNodesManager, and EtherFiRedemptionManager. Cannot unpause or modify any protocol state beyond halting operations.

eth:0x12582A27E5e19492b4FcD194a60F8f5e1a.name: Node Operator EOA (0x1258...1B0F)
eth:0x12582A27E5e19492b4FcD194a60F8f5e1a.description: An EOA with node operation privileges. Can execute validator tasks and approval tasks on EtherFiAdmin, batch-create beacon validators on LiquidityPool, and manage EigenLayer operations on EtherFiNodesManager (create pods, set proof submitters, queue/complete ETH and strategy withdrawals, link legacy validators). Operational role with no direct upgrade or parameter-setting authority.

eth:0x7835fB36A8143a014A2c381363cD1A4DeE.name: Checkpoint EOA (0x7835...5d2A)
eth:0x7835fB36A8143a014A2c381363cD1A4DeE.description: An EOA with limited EtherFiNodesManager privileges: can start and verify checkpoint proofs, and forward external/EigenPod calls. No capital control or upgrade authority.

eth:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000.name: Zero Address (Renounced)
eth:0x0000000000000000000000000000000000.description: Represents renounced permissions. Holds minting rights on DummyTokenUpgradeable, acceptOwnership on RoleRegistry, and rescueERC20 on external Coinbase cbETH and Curve WrapTokenV3ETH. These permissions are effectively burned.

eth:0x00000000219ab540356cBB839Cbe05303d.name: Ethereum Beacon Chain DepositContract
eth:0x00000000219ab540356cBB839Cbe05303d.description: Ethereum's native Beacon Chain deposit contract. EtherFi deposits 32 ETH per validator through StakingManager to activate new beacon validators. An immutable system contract with no admin risk.

eth:0x91E677b07F7AF907ec9a428aafA9fc14a0.name: EigenLayer EigenPodManager
eth:0x91E677b07F7AF907ec9a428aafA9fc14a0.description: Manages EigenPod creation and beacon chain proof verification for EtherFi's restaked validators. Called by EtherFiNodesManager and EtherFiRestaker. Upgradeable by EigenLayer governance.

eth:0x39053D51B77DC0d36036Fc1fCc8Cb819df.name: EigenLayer DelegationManager
eth:0x39053D51B77DC0d36036Fc1fCc8Cb819df.description: Handles operator delegation and withdrawal queuing for EtherFi's restaked positions. EtherFiRestaker delegates to EigenLayer operators and queues/completes strategy withdrawals through this contract. Upgradeable by EigenLayer governance.

eth:0x858646372CC42E1A627fcE94aa7A7033e7.name: EigenLayer StrategyManager
eth:0x858646372CC42E1A627fcE94aa7A7033e7.description: Manages EtherFi's restaking strategy deposits into EigenLayer. EtherFiRestaker deposits stETH into EigenLayer strategies via this contract. The restaker holds {{restakerPositions}} in total positions across EigenLayer and Lido combined.

eth:0x7750d328b314EfFa365A0402CcfD489B80.name: EigenLayer RewardsCoordinator
eth:0x7750d328b314EfFa365A0402CcfD489B80.description: Distributes restaking rewards to EtherFi's restaker contract. EtherFiRestaker sets its rewards claimer through the DelegationManager which interacts with this coordinator.

eth:0xae7ab96520DE3A18E5e111B5EaAb095312.name: Lido stETH Token
eth:0xae7ab96520DE3A18E5e111B5EaAb095312.description: Lido's liquid staked ETH token. The Liquifier contract interacts with stETH for liquidity operations, and EtherFiRestaker holds stETH positions deposited into EigenLayer strategies.

eth:0x889edC2eDab5f40e902b864aD4d7AdE8E4.name: Lido WithdrawalQueueERC721
eth:0x889edC2eDab5f40e902b864aD4d7AdE8E4.description: Lido's withdrawal queue. EtherFiRestaker requests stETH-to-ETH withdrawals through this contract when rebalancing or exiting Lido positions.

eth:0xBe9895146f7AF43049ca1c1AE358B0541E.name: Coinbase cbETH Token
eth:0xBe9895146f7AF43049ca1c1AE358B0541E.description: Coinbase's wrapped staked ETH token. The Liquifier can accept and process cbETH deposits as an alternative liquid staking token input.

eth:0xa2E3356610840701BDf5611a53974510Ae.name: Curve WrapTokenV3ETH
eth:0xa2E3356610840701BDf5611a53974510Ae.description: Curve wrapper contract used by the Liquifier for token wrapping operations in liquidity management workflows.

eth:0x5FAE7E604FC3e24fd43A72867ceBaC94c6.name: Curve Vyper_contract
eth:0x5FAE7E604FC3e24fd43A72867ceBaC94c6.description: A Curve liquidity pool contract used for token swaps in the protocol's liquidity management operations.

eth:0x1a44076050125825900e736c501f859c50.name: LayerZero EndpointV2
eth:0x1a44076050125825900e736c501f859c50.description: LayerZero's cross-chain messaging endpoint. Used by EtherfiL1SyncPoolETH and EtherfiOFTAdapterUpgradeable for cross-chain eETH/weETH bridging and L1-L2 sync operations. Immutable contract with configurable message libraries.

eth:0xBe010A7e3686FdF65E93344ab664D065A0.name: LayerZero Unknown Contract
eth:0xBe010A7e3686FdF65E93344ab664D065A0.description: A LayerZero infrastructure contract that interacts with EtherFi's cross-chain messaging components. Writes to protocol state via the OFT adapter layer.

eth:0x308861A430be4cce5502d0A12724771Fc6.name: LiquidityPool (ETH)
eth:0x308861A430be4cce5502d0A12724771Fc6.description: The main liquidity pool holding user-deposited ETH awaiting validator deployment or withdrawal processing. Holds {{liquidityPoolBalance}} primarily in ETH, representing the protocol's liquid reserves available for staking and redemptions.

eth:0x6329004E903B7F420245E7aF3f355186f2.name: Treasury (ETH)
eth:0x6329004E903B7F420245E7aF3f355186f2.description: Protocol treasury holding accumulated fees and reserves. Contains {{treasuryBalance}} in ETH, controlled by the main 3-day timelock.

eth:0x35fA164735182de50811E8e2E824cFb9B6.name: eETH Token
eth:0x35fA164735182de50811E8e2E824cFb9B6.description: The ether.fi ETH rebasing token contract. eETH represents staked ETH positions with a current market capitalization of {{eethMarketCap}}.

eth:0xCd5fE23C85820F7B72D0926FC9b05b43E3.name: Wrapped eETH (weETH)
eth:0xCd5fE23C85820F7B72D0926FC9b05b43E3.description: The non-rebasing wrapped eETH token. Holds {{weethBalance}} in eETH and other tokens, representing wrapped staking positions used for DeFi integrations and cross-chain bridging.

eth:0x1B7a4C3797236A1C37f8741c0Be35c2c72.name: EtherFiRestaker (EigenLayer Positions)
eth:0x1B7a4C3797236A1C37f8741c0Be35c2c72.description: Holds EtherFi's restaked positions in EigenLayer and Lido. {{restakerPositions}} in DeFi positions split between EigenLayer deposits/yield (stETH restaked) and Lido staked ETH. This is the largest single concentration of protocol capital.

codeAndAudits.title: Code & Audits
codeAndAudits.description: Smart contract analysis and audit history
